title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that junior cloud engineers must shift from coding-centric skills to understanding fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and performance while using AI agents for acceleration. The video asserts that knowing what to build and why matters more than coding ability as AI generates infrastructure code and CI/CD pipelines.
